description: Structured policy snippets used to ground adaptive explanations.

sources.title: NFHS-5 rural internet access baseline
sources.stat: Rural internet penetration remains significantly below urban levels.
sources.usage: Used when low or intermittent internet reliability contributes to ODS.

sources.title: First-generation education barriers
sources.stat: First-generation learners often face reduced guidance and support networks.
sources.usage: Used for context rationale in dynamic explanations.

sources.title: Distance-to-institution burden
sources.stat: Long travel distance increases educational friction and dropout risk.
